mnemonics.title: Traversal Orders
mnemonics.content: InOrder: Left-Root-Right (Like reading book pages), PreOrder: Root-Left-Right (Like cloning tree), PostOrder: Left-Right-Root (Like deleting nodes)

mnemonics.title: BST Rules
mnemonics.content: Left Less, Right More - Every Node Must Obey (LL-RM-ENMO)

acronyms.usage: Used when mentioning the data structure

visualTips.visualization: Imagine grabbing a node and 'pivoting' its children to balance the tree
Visualize dropping a marble - rolls left/right based on comparisons until it finds empty spot

analogies.analogy: Like a family hierarchy where younger generations go left, older go right
Similar to weighing scale - needs equal distribution on both sides
